description: A designed graphic over a black-and-white photo of handcuffed hands. Light blue capitals read 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with '1/27/2025 | Atlanta, GA' beneath. Large white text reads 'Venezuelan National', then 'CRIMES:' and a bulleted list 'Robbery' and 'Possession of a firearm'. An ICE logo is at lower left and a red diagonal banner at lower right reads 'ATLANTA'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/27/2025 Atlanta, GA; Venezuelan National; CRIMES: Robbery; Possession of a firearm; ICE; ATLANTA
